mapper.select:
SELECT id, resource_key, resource_name, version, project_id, connector_type, default_value, exception_value, timeout, crt_user, crt_time, upt_user, upt_time, resource_json FROM ttd_connector
deleted = 0
AND resource_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.resourceKey}, '%')
AND resource_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.resourceName}, '%')
AND connector_type = #{req.connectorType}
ORDER BY crt_time DESC
